---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for PlantAI
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: tarunrwt
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Use Case
Who benefits and how? (e.g., "As a farmer, I want to...")

## 📋 Proposed Solution
How you'd like this to work.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions you've thought about.

## 📸 Mockups
If applicable, add mockups or wireframes.
